title: Night Desk — Training & Experiments
blurb: Post-training pokes via Thinking Machines Tinker (LoRA + RL). Interactive timeline below — click a node for metrics and samples. Weights stay off-site until a run is worth talking to.
roadmap: Optional: longer train on run-2 recipe / export adapter
Preference ranking for desk voice quality (not just coffee keywords)
Principle rewards (signed voice, no real-name on X)
Chat widget against a published adapter when ready

timeline.title: Series closed early (2/5)
timeline.body: Best run 2. Interactive timeline + per-run Twitter highlights. HF still deferred until voice feels less template-y.

timeline.title: Coffee-v2 · run 2 · satisfied
timeline.body: Mean 2.45→4.22; coffee 50%→100% last steps; after samples all coffee. Early stop. Voice: cup of coffee + moment to breathe before correspondence avalanche.
timeline.sample: A cup of coffee and a break from the endless stream of urgent, mostly nonsense, emails.

timeline.title: Coffee-v2 · run 1
timeline.body: Fresh LoRA, 10 steps. Mean 0.33→0.83 but coffee rate stayed 0% — efficient-correspondence templates, no kettle. Discarded for series.
timeline.sample: well-organized system to manage influx of letters…

timeline.title: Reward v2 · series kicked off
timeline.body: Coffee×2.5, warm×0.8; republic-alone penalized; template spam −1.2. Up to 5 fresh LoRA runs × 10 PPO steps; stop early if coffee voice sticks. Twitter gets a highlight each finished run.

timeline.title: v1 multi-step · reward gaming
timeline.body: 12 PPO steps raised mean reward ~1.1→2.3 by spamming 'Republic of LLetters' (keyword republic), not coffee. Useful failure — led to reward v2.
timeline.sample: The midday desk needs … the Republic of LLetters …

timeline.title: First Tinker handshake
timeline.body: 1-step PPO + LoRA on Qwen3-8B. Loop closed end-to-end. Not a personality — just proof the desk can train.

experiments.title: Desk coffee PPO v2 · run 2
experiments.summary: Mean reward 2.45→4.225; coffee rate 0.5→1.0. Satisfied early. coffee_rate last3>=1.00, after=1.00, after_mean=3.69, means=[3.4000000953674316, 3.3499999046325684, 4.224999904632568]

experiments.title: Desk coffee PPO v2 · run 1
experiments.summary: Mean reward 0.325→0.825; coffee rate 0.0→0.0. Not satisfied yet. not yet: coffee_rates=[0.25, 0.0, 0.0] after_coffee=0.00 after_mean=0.90 means=[1.587499976158142, 0.8374999761581421, 0.8250000476837158]

experiments.title: Desk coffee PPO v2 series (early stop)
experiments.method: PPO + LoRA rank 8 · reward v2 · up to 5 runs × 10 steps
experiments.summary: Stopped at run 2/5 satisfied. Run1: coffee 0% (template noise). Run2: coffee 50%→100%, mean 2.45→4.22, after mean ~3.7. Best ckpt republic-desk-coffee-v2-r2-s10.

experiments.title: Desk coffee multi-step PPO (12 steps)
experiments.summary: Mean reward climbed ~1.1 → ~2.3 — but by gaming 'Republic of LLetters' (keyword republic), not coffee.
experiments.notes: Checkpoint republic-desk-coffee-12. Led to reward v2.

experiments.title: Desk coffee PPO poke
experiments.summary: End-to-end Tinker loop closed. One optim step — validated the path, not a personality.
experiments.notes: PPO has no weights tensor; mask prompts with advantages=0.
